name: smorch-dev
description: Workflow plugin. 10 commands (plan/code/score/bridge-gaps/handover/qa-handover-score/qa-run/ship/triage/retro). 9 skills (smo-scorer, lessons-manager, elegance-pause, arabic-rtl-checker, mena-mobile-check, brd-traceability, handover-generator, qa-handover-scorer, cost-tracker).

name: smorch-ops
description: Infra plugin. 7 commands (deploy/rollback/drift/health/incident/secrets/skill-sync). 7 skills (security-hardener, incident-runbook, deploy-pipeline, rollback-runbook, drift-detector, secrets-manager, codex-doctrine).

name: eo-microsaas-dev
description: Student-facing fork of smorch-dev. 8 commands + 9 skills. 90+ ship gate (vs 92 internal).

name: Install — eng-desktop
description: Mamoun Mac + future hires (Mac/Linux). Installs full toolkit + cron sync.

name: Install — qa-machine
description: Lana Windows (PowerShell). winget + Task Scheduler for 30-min sync.

name: Install — dev-server
description: smo-dev + smo-eo-qa. Ops-only (no IDE plugins).

name: Install — prod-server
description: eo-prod + smo-prod. Ops + security-hardener baseline applied.

name: validate-plugins.sh
description: Schema-checks both plugin.json files. Runs in CI via .github/workflows/validate.yml.

name: sync-from-github.sh
description: Cron-invoked (30 min): pull + install + validate. Telegram alert on failure.

name: grep-audit-rename.sh
description: One-shot: grep literal 'smorch-dev' across all configs before rename. Safety net.

name: validate.yml
description: GitHub Actions: runs validate-plugins.sh on every PR + push.

name: sync-to-machines.yml
description: GitHub Actions: on push, SSH to all 4 servers via Tailscale + trigger sync-from-github.sh. <60s target.
